events.name: Denver Nuggets at New York Knicks

headlines.description: — Jalen Brunson had 42 points, nine assists and eight rebounds, and the New York Knicks outlasted the Denver Nuggets 134-127 in two overtimes Wednesday night for their eighth straight victory.
headlines.shortLinkText: Knicks outlast Nuggets 134-127 in 2 OTs for their eighth straight victory as Brunson scores 42

headlines.description: — Anthony Edwards scored 13 of his 30 points in the fourth quarter, Bones Hyland had 20 points and the Minnesota Timberwolves overcame an 18-point deficit to beat the Toronto Raptors 128-126 on Wednesday.
headlines.shortLinkText: Edwards scores 30 points as Timberwolves rally for 5th win in six games, beat Raptors 128-126

headlines.description: — Derrick White made six 3-pointers and scored 28 points and the Boston Celtics used a big third quarter to build the lead and cruise to a 114-93 win over the Houston Rockets on Wednesday night.
headlines.shortLinkText: Derrick White's 28 points power Celtics to 114-93 win over Rockets

events.name: New Orleans Pelicans at Milwaukee Bucks

headlines.description: — Ryan Rollins scored 27 points and the Milwaukee Bucks withstood a brilliant performance from Trey Murphy III to beat the New Orleans Pelicans 141-137 in overtime Wednesday night.
headlines.shortLinkText: Bucks overcome a 44-point game by Trey Murphy III and beat Pelicans 141-137 in OT

headlines.description: — Keldon Johnson scored 25 points, Victor Wembanyama had 22 points and 14 rebounds and the San Antonio Spurs never trailed in a 116-106 victory over injury-depleted Oklahoma City on Wednesday night, beating the reigning NBA champion Thunder for a...
headlines.shortLinkText: Johnson, Wembanyama lead Spurs to 4th win over OKC, beating the injury-depleted Thunder 116-106

headlines.description: — Cam Spencer hit three key baskets late in the fourth quarter and finished with 20 points, and Ty Jerome added 28 as the Memphis Grizzlies beat Sacramento 129-125 on Wednesday night, sending the Kings to their season-worst 10th straight loss.
headlines.shortLinkText: Grizzlies beat Sacramento 129-125, send Kings to their season-worst 10th straight loss

headlines.description: — Donovan Mitchell scored 29 points and had nine assists, Jaylon Tyson added 17 points and the Cleveland Cavaliers routed the Los Angeles Clippers 124-89 on Wednesday night, hours after the teams completed a trade of All-Stars.
headlines.shortLinkText: Cavaliers rout Clippers 124-89 after Garland-Harden trade
